description: You are a recording engineer at a small studio. The vocalist made an error between the 8-second and 14-second marks. Configure the MyProject session for a punch-in recording pass by setting the punch range from 8.0 to 14.0 seconds and enabling both punch-in and punch-out. Set the loop range from 6.0 to 16.0 seconds to provide a lead-in and lead-out for the vocalist. Create two named markers at the punch boundaries (8.0s and 14.0s) with descriptive names like 'Punch In' and 'Punch Out'. Ensure the audio track is record-armed and save the session.
